_comment: Config for scanning THIS repo (the scanner's own). allowFiles skips the test harness, which intentionally contains leak-shaped fixtures (synthetic emails/IPs) to exercise detection. allow scopes the GitHub handle in install URLs / LICENSE so a local scan with an owner list does not trip on the public namespace. The placeholder email/IP tokens below are documentation examples in README.md and WHITEPAPER.md that illustrate the config format and the generic PII patterns; they are fixed fake values, not owner data, so allow-listing them by exact string suppresses only those example lines and still catches any real leak (a different value on a different line).
